name: Chocolate Biscotti Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, soak the gelatin in cold water.
2. Bring 1 cup of heavy whipping cream to a boil.
3. Add the boiling cream to the soaked gelatin and blend well.
4. Add the melted chocolate to the gelatin mixture and mix thoroughly.
5. Set aside to cool before using.
6. In a separate bowl, combine the eggs, remaining 1/2 cup of hot cream, and vanilla extract.
7. Gradually add the egg mixture to the gelatin mixture and combine thoroughly.
8. Allow the pudding mixture to cool before using.
